data.name: Lind

weaponImprint.name: Thorn Criterion
weaponImprint.trait: AoE damage dealt is increased by 5%. When dealing AoE Corrosion damage, the AoE damage dealt is further increased by 5%.
weaponImprint.effect: Before attacking, for each debuff on the enemy target, damage dealt is increased by 3%/4%/5%/7%/8%/9%, to a maximum increase of 18%/24%/30%/35%/40%/45%. If Corrosion damage is dealt, Corrosion damage dealt is increased by 10%.
weaponImprint.imprintDescription: Damage dealt to targets with Corrosion debuffs is increased by 2.5%. Damage dealt to PMC units is increased by 2.5%.

data.effects: A Doll who appears hot-tempered on the outside but is actually sensitive on the inside, often forcing herself to do things she's not good at and falling into self-loathing. Enjoys staying up late listening to late-night radio. If she doesn't consume sugar in time, she easily gets nauseous. Strongly dislikes savage violence, but she believes weapons are merely a civilized and effective means of resolution, so using guns doesn't fall into that category. "Consuming too much sugar will cause me to malfunction, but if I don't consume any, I'll break down immediately, so I'll eat anyway... Mm. Commander, would you like a piece too?"

skills.name: Repulsive Shot
skills.description: Selects one enemy target within 6 tiles and deals Physical damage equal to 80% of attack to it.

skills.name: Sweets Stockpile
skills.description:
At the end of the action, Lind gains 1 point of Confectance Index.

At the start of the turn, applies [effect:07e12471-a5f5-4689-8a40-342ba9879a19] to all enemy units. This effect has a cooldown of 1 turn.

When an enemy unit with [effect:07e12471-a5f5-4689-8a40-342ba9879a19] dies or an allied unit deals Corrosion damage, Lind gains 1 stack of [effect:d78cda3d-c53a-4734-862f-8a513f7e8aee]. When Lind holds 5 or more stacks of [effect:d78cda3d-c53a-4734-862f-8a513f7e8aee], before attacking enemy targets with [effect:07e12471-a5f5-4689-8a40-342ba9879a19], triggers the effects of [effect:07e12471-a5f5-4689-8a40-342ba9879a19]. [effect:07e12471-a5f5-4689-8a40-342ba9879a19] is consumed thereafter.
skills.descriptionLevel2:
At the end of the action, Lind gains 1 point of Confectance Index.

At the start of the turn, applies [effect:07e12471-a5f5-4689-8a40-342ba9879a19] to all enemy units. This effect has a cooldown of 1 turn.

At the start of the battle, for each allied Doll on the battlefield, Lind gains 1 stack of [effect:d78cda3d-c53a-4734-862f-8a513f7e8aee]. When an enemy unit with [effect:07e12471-a5f5-4689-8a40-342ba9879a19] dies or an allied unit deals Corrosion damage, Lind gains 1 stack of [effect:d78cda3d-c53a-4734-862f-8a513f7e8aee].
When Lind holds 5 or more stacks of [effect:d78cda3d-c53a-4734-862f-8a513f7e8aee], before attacking enemy targets with [effect:07e12471-a5f5-4689-8a40-342ba9879a19], triggers the effects of [effect:07e12471-a5f5-4689-8a40-342ba9879a19]. [effect:07e12471-a5f5-4689-8a40-342ba9879a19] is consumed thereafter.
skills.descriptionLevel3:
At the end of the action, Lind gains 1 point of Confectance Index.

At the start of the turn, applies [effect:07e12471-a5f5-4689-8a40-342ba9879a19] to all enemy units.

At the start of the battle, for each allied Doll on the battlefield, Lind gains 1 stack of [effect:d78cda3d-c53a-4734-862f-8a513f7e8aee]. When an enemy unit with [effect:07e12471-a5f5-4689-8a40-342ba9879a19] dies or an allied unit deals Corrosion damage, Lind gains 1 stack of [effect:d78cda3d-c53a-4734-862f-8a513f7e8aee].
When Lind holds 5 or more stacks of [effect:d78cda3d-c53a-4734-862f-8a513f7e8aee], before attacking enemy targets with [effect:07e12471-a5f5-4689-8a40-342ba9879a19], triggers the effects of [effect:07e12471-a5f5-4689-8a40-342ba9879a19]. [effect:07e12471-a5f5-4689-8a40-342ba9879a19] is consumed thereafter.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect:
At the start of the battle, for each allied Doll on the battlefield, Lind gains 1 stack of [effect:d78cda3d-c53a-4734-862f-8a513f7e8aee]. The maximum number of [effect:d78cda3d-c53a-4734-862f-8a513f7e8aee] stacks is increased to 30.

The effect of [effect:d78cda3d-c53a-4734-862f-8a513f7e8aee] is enhanced: Corrosion damage dealt boost is increased to 2% instead.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel3.effect:
Applies [effect:07e12471-a5f5-4689-8a40-342ba9879a19] at the start of the turn. It no longer has cooldown.

When [effect:07e12471-a5f5-4689-8a40-342ba9879a19] is triggered, the number of powerful debuffs that can be randomly applied to enemy units is increased by 3. In addition, the damage multiplier is increased to 120%, and critical damage is increased by 15%.

skills.name: Assault Spray
skills.description: Select 1 direction, and deals AoE Corrosion damage equal to 100% of attack to all enemies in a narrow-angled fan-shaped are 6 tiles wide in the selected direction. For each debuff on a target, damage dealt is increased by 5%, to a maximum increase of 30%. Before the skill resolves, applies 1 random powerful debuff to all enemy units in the effective range. After the skill resolves, Lind gains 2 points of Confectance Index.
skills.descriptionLevel2: Select 1 direction, and deals AoE Corrosion damage equal to 100% of attack to all enemies in a fan-shaped are 6 tiles wide in the selected direction, and applies 2 stacks of [effect:99f12388-757e-4e6a-a187-7f823e50ddd9] to all targets in ite effective range. For each debuff on a target, damage dealt is increased by 10%, to a maximum increase of 60%. Before the skill resolves, applies 1 random powerful debuff to all enemy units in the effective range. After the skill resolves, Lind gains 2 points of Confectance Index.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect:
Applies 2 stacks of [effect:99f12388-757e-4e6a-a187-7f823e50ddd9] on enemy targets.

Increases the skill's effective range.

For each debuff held by the enemy, increases damage dealt by 10%, up to a maximum of 60%.

skills.name: Overwhelming Burst
skills.description: Deals AoE Corrosion damage equal to 100% of attack to all enemy targets within 6 tiles. Before skill usage, if Confectance Index is at maximum, the damage multiplier is increased by 5% for each stack of [effect:d78cda3d-c53a-4734-862f-8a513f7e8aee] held by Lind.
skills.descriptionLevel2: Deals AoE Corrosion damage equal to 120% of attack to all enemy targets within 6 tiles. Before skill usage, if Confectance Index is at maximum, critical damage is increased by 20% and the damage multiplier is increased by 10% for each stack of [effect:d78cda3d-c53a-4734-862f-8a513f7e8aee] held by Lind.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect:
The damage multiplier is increased to 120% and stability damage dealt is increased by 1 point.

Before skill usage, if Confectance Index is at maximum, critical damage is increased by 20%, and the damage multiplier boost is increased to 10% for each stack of [effect:d78cda3d-c53a-4734-862f-8a513f7e8aee] held by Lind.

skills.name: Glucose Overload
skills.description: Applies [effect:2caa0ee6-a15d-4a25-849e-fa65a552987f] to all enemy units within 8 tiles for 1 turn. After this skill resolves, triggers all Corrosion debuffs held by all enemy units within this skill's effective range. After skill usage, Lind can use the active skill [dollSkill:20ca9f4c-50f6-45a1-96b6-6af2ca3789f2], the active skill [dollSkill:22da7130-ee62-417e-89fc-50d38b9ec8eb], or the basic attack [dollSkill:e4d768ec-4820-44b1-9e73-1b54ebcd348e].
skills.descriptionLevel2: Applies [effect:2caa0ee6-a15d-4a25-849e-fa65a552987f] to all enemy units within 8 tiles for 1 turn. After this skill resolves, triggers all Corrosion debuffs held by all enemy units within this skill's effective range. The damage dealt by the next active skill is increased by 15%. After skill usage, Lind can use the active skill [dollSkill:20ca9f4c-50f6-45a1-96b6-6af2ca3789f2], the active skill [dollSkill:22da7130-ee62-417e-89fc-50d38b9ec8eb], or the basic attack [dollSkill:e4d768ec-4820-44b1-9e73-1b54ebcd348e].
skills.descriptionLevel3: Applies [effect:2caa0ee6-a15d-4a25-849e-fa65a552987f] to all enemy units within 8 tiles for 1 turn. After this skill resolves, triggers all Corrosion debuffs held by all enemy units within this skill's effective range. The damage dealt by the next active skill is increased by 15%. After skill usage, Lind can use the active skill [dollSkill:20ca9f4c-50f6-45a1-96b6-6af2ca3789f2], the active skill [dollSkill:22da7130-ee62-417e-89fc-50d38b9ec8eb], or the basic attack [dollSkill:e4d768ec-4820-44b1-9e73-1b54ebcd348e]. In addition, Lind gains 3 points of Confectance Index after skill usage. If Lind has 10 stacks of [effect:d78cda3d-c53a-4734-862f-8a513f7e8aee], this skill's cooldown is reduced by 1 turn.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect:
The damage dealt by the next active skill used is increased by 15%.

The effects of [effect:2caa0ee6-a15d-4a25-849e-fa65a552987f] is enhanced: Corrosion damage dealt boost by Lind is increased to 12%, to a maximum increase of 72%.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel3.effect: Lind gains 3 points of Confectance Index after skill usage. If Lind has 10 stacks of [effect:d78cda3d-c53a-4734-862f-8a513f7e8aee], this skill's cooldown is reduced by 1 turn.

keys.effect: When attacking enemy units with debuffs, phase damage dealt is increased by 10%.
At the start of the turn, Lind gains [effect:af640815-bbef-471b-8888-cee6c3d8b4a4].
After using the active skill Assault Spray or the active skill Overwhelming Burst, Lind gains 5 tiles of [effect:1b83587d-eddc-4abd-b90c-cb0aa4b2cfef].

Selects 1 allied Doll on the battlefield. The selected Doll will be unable to move or use active skills in the battle, but all enemy units' defense is reduced by 15% until the selected Doll dies. Lind gains [effect:3fbcb8ae-7ffa-4e2e-9dce-1269da8ff4d2].
When the active skill Overwhelming Burst hits only 1 enemy target, damage dealt to the enemy target is increased by 30%.
When Lind has [effect:d78cda3d-c53a-4734-862f-8a513f7e8aee], cleanses 1 debuff from herself before an attack resolves.
Before the Ultimate skill Glucose Overload resolves, Lind gains [effect:d57b4e35-45b8-4c7a-8521-afcd99c30dd9] for 2 turns.

vertebrae.effect:
At the start of the battle, for each allied Doll on the battlefield, Lind gains 1 stack of [effect:d78cda3d-c53a-4734-862f-8a513f7e8aee]. The maximum number of [effect:d78cda3d-c53a-4734-862f-8a513f7e8aee] stacks is increased to 30.

The effect of [effect:d78cda3d-c53a-4734-862f-8a513f7e8aee] is enhanced: Corrosion damage dealt boost is increased to 2% instead.

doll.name: Lind
doll.effects: A Doll who appears hot-tempered on the outside but is actually sensitive on the inside, often forcing herself to do things she's not good at and falling into self-loathing. Enjoys staying up late listening to late-night radio. If she doesn't consume sugar in time, she easily gets nauseous. Strongly dislikes savage violence, but she believes weapons are merely a civilized and effective means of resolution, so using guns doesn't fall into that category. "Consuming too much sugar will cause me to malfunction, but if I don't consume any, I'll break down immediately, so I'll eat anyway... Mm. Commander, would you like a piece too?"

Enjoys staying up late listening to late-night radio. If she doesn't consume sugar in time, she easily gets nauseous. Strongly dislikes savage violence, but she believes weapons are merely a civilized and effective means of resolution, so using guns doesn't fall into that category. "Consuming too much sugar will cause me to malfunction, but if I don't consume any, I'll break down immediately, so I'll eat anyway... Mm. Commander, would you like a piece too?"

skillsLevel3.name: Glucose Overload
skillsLevel3.description: Applies [effect:2caa0ee6-a15d-4a25-849e-fa65a552987f] to all enemy units within 8 tiles for 1 turn. After this skill resolves, triggers all Corrosion debuffs held by all enemy units within this skill's effective range. After skill usage, Lind can use the active skill [dollSkill:20ca9f4c-50f6-45a1-96b6-6af2ca3789f2], the active skill [dollSkill:22da7130-ee62-417e-89fc-50d38b9ec8eb], or the basic attack [dollSkill:e4d768ec-4820-44b1-9e73-1b54ebcd348e].
skillsLevel3.descriptionLevel2: Applies [effect:2caa0ee6-a15d-4a25-849e-fa65a552987f] to all enemy units within 8 tiles for 1 turn. After this skill resolves, triggers all Corrosion debuffs held by all enemy units within this skill's effective range. The damage dealt by the next active skill is increased by 15%. After skill usage, Lind can use the active skill [dollSkill:20ca9f4c-50f6-45a1-96b6-6af2ca3789f2], the active skill [dollSkill:22da7130-ee62-417e-89fc-50d38b9ec8eb], or the basic attack [dollSkill:e4d768ec-4820-44b1-9e73-1b54ebcd348e].
skillsLevel3.descriptionLevel3: Applies [effect:2caa0ee6-a15d-4a25-849e-fa65a552987f] to all enemy units within 8 tiles for 1 turn. After this skill resolves, triggers all Corrosion debuffs held by all enemy units within this skill's effective range. The damage dealt by the next active skill is increased by 15%. After skill usage, Lind can use the active skill [dollSkill:20ca9f4c-50f6-45a1-96b6-6af2ca3789f2], the active skill [dollSkill:22da7130-ee62-417e-89fc-50d38b9ec8eb], or the basic attack [dollSkill:e4d768ec-4820-44b1-9e73-1b54ebcd348e]. In addition, Lind gains 3 points of Confectance Index after skill usage. If Lind has 10 stacks of [effect:d78cda3d-c53a-4734-862f-8a513f7e8aee], this skill's cooldown is reduced by 1 turn.

imagoforms.effect: Damage dealt to enemy units with Corrosion debuffs is increased by 5%.
Physical and phase damage taken is reduced by 5%.
Corrosion damage dealt is increased by 5%.
Damage dealt to enemy targets in Stability Break is increased by 10%.
The damage of attacks which hit 2 or more enemy units is increased by 12%.

dollEffects.effectDetails: Debuff effects cannot be cleansed. For each cleanse effect blocked by this effect, removes 1 stack of this effect. Considered a neutral status effect, cannot be cleansed.

{"mainDetails":"

Increases Corrosion damage dealt by 1%. This can be stacked up to 10 times, and cannot be cleansed.

","upgrades":[{"id":"f0ceb04f-c620-477b-9421-ae84db9159f8","upgradeName":"V1","upgradeDetails":"

Increases Corrosion damage dealt by 2%. This can be stacked up to 30 times, and cannot be cleansed.

","order":0}]}

{"mainDetails":"

When [effect:07e12471-a5f5-4689-8a40-342ba9879a19] is triggered, Lind applies 3 random powerful debuff to the debuff holder, cleanses 1 buff, and performs [effect:ab2e634f-d257-44e3-af90-ce66a6ac43f3], dealing AoE Corrosion damage equal to 80% of attack and 1 point of stability damage. Considered a Corrosion debuff, cannot be cleansed.

Dandegate Note: Honeytrap itself lasts for 1 round but the powerful debuffs have a 2 turn duration.

","upgrades":[{"id":"6506dc42-d440-4289-ad19-9ed799c03068","upgradeName":"V3","upgradeDetails":"

When [effect:07e12471-a5f5-4689-8a40-342ba9879a19] is triggered, Lind applies 6 random powerful debuff to the debuff holder, cleanses 1 buff, and performs [effect:ab2e634f-d257-44e3-af90-ce66a6ac43f3], dealing AoE Corrosion damage equal to 120% of attack and 1 point of stability damage. Critical damage from this attack is increased by 15%. Considered a Corrosion debuff, cannot be cleansed.

Dandegate Note: Honeytrap itself lasts for 1 round but the powerful debuffs have a 2 turn duration.

","order":0}]}

{"mainDetails":"

For each debuff on the target, Corrosion damage from Lind is increased by 5%, up to a maximum increase of 30%. This is considered as a Corrosion debuff.

","upgrades":[{"id":"786343ae-5a52-4c72-b303-8e6436ec8d0a","upgradeName":"V2","upgradeDetails":"

For each debuff on the target, Corrosion damage from Lind is increased by 12%, up to a maximum increase of 72%. This is considered as a Corrosion debuff.

","order":0}]}
